{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord step two
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The second step to [[Underlord]] is weaving [[soulfire]] from [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“Second, you must weave soulfire from aura.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
